name: Image Generation
description: Illustrates the story with Novita AI images. Auto-generates every N turns, or on demand with /image. Configure API key, model, and prompts in the Image Studio main-menu entry.

modes.label: Image Studio
modes.description: Configure Novita AI image generation and browse the gallery

mutation_schema.turns_since_image: integer — storyteller generations since the last auto image
mutation_schema.last_trigger: string — id of the most recently started generation record
